steps.title: Identify what we know
steps.content: The equation $x + y = 48$ relates marble queen stems ($x$) and snow queen stems ($y$). We're told that $y = 18$ snow queen stems are propagated. We need to find $x$.

steps.title: Substitute the known value and solve
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 18$ into the equation:
$$x + 18 = 48$$
Subtract 18 from both sides:
$$x = 48 - 18 = 30$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
